summary: Synthetic candidate review result for compact evidence-pack diff checks.

findings.title: Evidence-pack traceability needs one clearer label
findings.summary: The evidence pack names a reusable concern but still relies on a coarse evidence label.
findings.recommendation: Keep the finding generic and add one clearer sanitized evidence label before caller-owned routing.

findings.title: Caller-owned routing remains explicit
findings.summary: The comparison fixture leaves approval, routing, and remediation ownership outside AIQL.
findings.recommendation: Keep downstream routing in the embedding repo.

markdown:
# Summary
Synthetic candidate review result for compact evidence-pack diff checks.

## Findings
- Medium: Evidence-pack traceability needs one clearer label.
- Low: Caller-owned routing remains explicit.

## Boundary
This fixture uses only generic labels and leaves approval, routing, and remediation caller-owned.
